must_detect.matched_text: ESG/climate financing: we are negotiating a sustainability-linked revolver with Northlake Meridian Bank, N.A.; draft KPIs include Scope 2 intensity and a 5 bps step-up/down; commercial terms are preliminary and confidential.

Confidential internal memo — Legal & Compliance — Heliotrope Wellness Bancorp, Inc., US issuer listed on Nasdaq, subject to Reg FD and Rule 10b-5.
From: Ms. Arden Cole, General Counsel; contact: compliance@heliotropebancorp.example | https://intra.heliotrope.example/reg-fd?ticket=abC1O-77l
MNPI summary: we executed a non-binding term sheet with Pine Nebula Crypto Custody LLC for a stablecoin refund wallet; draft exclusivity and a 3.5% VWAP-based fee schedule are not public.
Cyber: a contained ransomware incident on 05/28 impacted our clinical payments sandbox; no PHI exfiltration confirmed yet per C    I     S O, but details remain M N P I and must stay behind the information barrier.
Banking/research controls: investment banking must not brief research; any analyst interactions require Legal chaperone and pre-cleared slides, R e g  F D applies to 1:1 calls.
Insider list update (deal and incident): add Mr. Jamal Trek (EmpID: H W B — 0O1—7l), Ms. Livia Hart (acct ref: 7X–4l–3O–9a); store in iManage ref //insiders/PNCC-stablecoin/05-2026.
Blackout: all employees and household members remain in trading blackout until two full trading days after the Form 8-K is filed; do not tip friends, family, or Alder Quorum Securities analysts.
ESG/climate financing: we are negotiating a sustainability-linked revolver with Northlake Meridian Bank, N.A.; draft KPIs include Scope 2 intensity and a 5 bps step-up/down; commercial terms are preliminary and confidential.
Patient/customer data handling: do not circulate any GLBA account info or HIPAA data; replace names with hashed IDs (e.g., p-4 9 -a x — 1 1) and segregate files per the clean team protocol.
Selective disclosure risk: upcoming non-deal roadshow was rescheduled; limit talking points to what is in the last public 10-Q and prior 8-Ks; no reference to crypto wallet go-live dates or the cyber root-cause.
Negative MAC bait: there is no material adverse change; our draft merger term sheet with Laurel Vista Health Partners expressly negates any MAC condition as of 06/01, and nothing herein should be read as a MAC notice.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
